title: Pear upside-down cake
contents: A moist cake baked with sliced pears, brown sugar, butter, vanilla, and a tender crumb.

title: Spiced pear loaf
contents: A simple loaf cake with pears, cinnamon, nutmeg, and yogurt for a soft texture.

title: Pear and almond tart
contents: A buttery tart filled with almond cream and fresh pear slices.

title: Chocolate fudge cake
contents: A rich chocolate cake with cocoa, butter, eggs, flour, and frosting.

title: Apple crumble cake
contents: A fruit cake with apples, cinnamon, and a crumb topping.

title: Vanilla sponge cake
contents: A light sponge cake for layering with cream and fruit.

title: Carrot cake
contents: A spiced cake with grated carrots, walnuts, and cream cheese frosting.

title: Lemon drizzle loaf
contents: A bright citrus loaf with lemon zest and a sweet glaze.

title: Pear muffins
contents: Quick muffins with diced pears, oats, and cinnamon.

title: Pear and ginger cake
contents: A warmly spiced cake with pears and crystallized ginger.
